Internal Compliance Memo: PIPL/CSL/DSL Coverage and MNPI Controls – Phase I Listing Readiness
From: Ms. Zhao Meilin, Compliance Director, Blue Willow Robotics Co., Ltd. (USCC 9Z2K-31Q8-0045X1); To: Board Risk Committee; Date: 2026-05-31
Issuer context: Pre-filing with the Shanhai Securities Commission and intended listing on the Donghai Stock Exchange; blackout effective 2026-05-20
DPA Schedule 2 (HR Data) with Cloud River Processing Pte. Ltd. covers payroll support; PRC SCCs executed and PIPIA completed on 2026-05-04
Cross-border transfer of 3,412 employee records to Singapore on 2026-05-05 was approved under Data Export Approval No. CPAC-SEA-2026-117; this memo does not authorize any further transmission
Data minimisation: Onboarding forms now collect only last 4 digits of resident ID and masked bank account suffix; full numbers are stored solely in the encrypted payroll vault
Retention: Personnel files retained 10 years for tax; candidate CVs auto-deleted after 180 days; erasure of 2023 leavers completed on 2026-04-28 with audit logs
Data subject rights: DSAR from Mr. Qiu Rong (q.rong@bluewillow.example.cn) closed on 2026-05-18; verified copy issued and correction to address applied
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Han Yue opted out of marketing emails on 2026-05-12; marketing suppression list updated; no further outreach will be sent
Minors: Our recruitment portal blocks applicants under 16, and any <14 submissions detected in April were deleted without retention and reported in the quarterly PIPIA note
MNPI: Draft Q2 operating metrics and an unsigned private placement term sheet are inside information until public disclosure; the restricted list was updated and employee trading is prohibited
For avoidance of doubt, no board member or supervised person accessed the data room between blackout commencement and today, and grey-list monitoring flagged zero hits
Security and localisation: Production systems hosted in Tianqin Province; only HR mirror datasets replicate offshore under the SCCs; no critical information infrastructure is implicated
Policy control complete: Third-country subprocessor onboarding checklist was fully implemented in March, eliminating ad-hoc exports previously identified in 2025
Contact: dpo@bluewillow.example.cn and +86-400-010-7788 for DSARs, consent withdrawal, and erasure requests; escalation to Ms. Zhao as needed
